prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京师范大学（珠海校区）在黑龙江省物理类2025年最低录取位次约4279名（社会科学试验班），数学类约2844名。由于该校2021—2024年在黑龙江物理类无公开录取数据，仅以2025年为基准，位次处于全省前列，竞争激烈；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划：2025年3人，2026年增至6人，扩招100%。扩招幅度显著，将增加录取机会，但报考热度可能同步上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学（珠海校区）共享北京师范大学985/211/双一流身份，软科2026年主榜排名第19位（Top20），属全国顶尖师范院校，品牌号召力强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度稳中有升；教育学、心理学、中国语言文学、中国史、地理学、马克思主义理论等均为A+/A级学科。珠海校区开设数学类（含数学与应用数学、物理学、数据科学等）、理科试验班（含地理科学、心理学、生物科学、化学）等，与校本部优势学科一脉相承。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数学/统计类社会热度偏热（推荐），电子信息/通信高热推荐，师范/教育分化观望。物理类招生专业涵盖数学类、理科试验班、社会科学试验班（经济/金融科技），均为当前热门方向。黑龙江省2026年物理类考生约11.4万人，较2025年（11.7万）略降约2.5%，竞争压力略有缓和。；该校位于广东珠海，属跨省招生。在黑龙江招生占比极小（2025年全国总计划中黑龙江占比约2.2%），地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4279名、2026年计划扩招100%带来的竞争加剧效应、考生总数略降的缓和作用以及学校声誉稳定偏正面，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年明显后移（位次数字增大），预测约6796名，区间6296—7296名。扩招是位次后移的最主要驱动因素。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、物理学、系统科学与工程、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能（创新实验班）、应用统计学）
- 理科试验班（含地理科学、心理学、生物科学、化学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 社会科学试验班（含经济学（数据科学方向）、金融科技）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

暂无其他物理类招生专业。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6296—7296名内，建议以二档社会科学试验班为主攻方向，一档数学类/理科试验班作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<6296名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。由于2026年扩招100%，录取机会增加，但热门专业竞争仍激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) in Heilongjiang Province Physics Category 2025 minimum admission ranking approximately 4279 (Social Science Experimental Class), Mathematics Category approximately 2844. Since the university has no public admission data for 2021-2024 in Heilongjiang Physics Category, only 2025 is used as baseline, ranking in the top tier of the province, competition fierce; the university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Physics Category: 2025 3 students, 2026 increased to 6 students, expansion 100%. The expansion rate is significant, will increase admission opportunities, but application popularity may rise simultaneously.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) shares the 985/211/Double First-Class identity of Beijing Normal University, ranked 19th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a top national normal university with strong brand appeal; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative events; Douyin popularity ranked 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure medium to high, application attention steadily rising; Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, Marxist Theory, etc. are all A+/A level disciplines. Zhuhai Campus offers Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Data Science, etc.), Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Science, Chemistry, etc.), inheriting the advantageous disciplines of the main campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mathematics/Statistics categories socially hot (recommended), Electronics/Communication hot recommended, Normal/Education differentiated wait-and-see. Physics Category enrollment majors include Mathematics Category, Science Experimental Class, Social Science Experimental Class (Economics/Financial Technology), all currently popular directions. Heilongjiang Province 2026 Physics Category candidates approximately 114,000, slightly decreased by about 2.5% from 2025 (117,000), competition pressure slightly eased. The university is located in Zhuhai, Guangdong, cross-province enrollment. The proportion of enrollment in Heilongjiang is very small (2025 national total plan Heilongjiang accounts for about 2.2%), regional preference has limited impact on ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 4279, the intensified competition effect from the 2026 plan expansion of 100%, the slight easing effect from the decrease in total candidates, and the stable to positive school reputation, it is predicted that the 2026 Physics Category minimum admission ranking will significantly shift backward (ranking number increases), predicted to be about 6796, range 6296-7296. Expansion is the main driving factor for the ranking shift.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Statistics)
- Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Science, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Economics (Data Science Direction), Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
No other Physics Category enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 6296-7296, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Social Science Experimental Class as the main direction, with Tier 1 Mathematics Category/Science Experimental Class as a stretch; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6296), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. Due to the 2026 expansion of 100%, admission opportunities increase, but competition for popular majors remains fierce.
